message.content:
Read and extract text from all files in "/Users/canerden/Downloads/sales vlerick/". For each file, try these methods:

1. For .pdf files: pdftotext "filepath" - 2>/dev/null
2. For .pptx/.ppt files: python3 -c "from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation('filepath'); [print(shape.text) for slide in prs.slides for shape in slide.shapes if hasattr(shape, 'text')]" 2>/dev/null
3. For .docx files: python3 -c "import docx; doc = docx.Document('filepath'); [print(p.text) for p in doc.paragraphs]" 2>/dev/null

Process these files:
- /Users/canerden/Downloads/sales vlerick/1_Monday_Intro_2026.ppt

content.text: I'll extract text from all files in parallel using the appropriate methods for each file type.
